criterion: Land the augmentation/timeline postfix work: persistent prompts + params on artifacts, with state_at(commit) replay and freshness derivation.

acceptance_signals.description: Agent memory research survey complete with conclusion on git-anchored vs wall-clock anchoring
acceptance_signals.evidence: Tracker 7c910f78bf28796c finalized — wall-clock dominates production; librarian's git-anchor is novel.

acceptance_signals.description: Timeline schema (events + commits + sources + event_edges) implemented
acceptance_signals.evidence: Migration shipped; all tables active in librarian-mcp.

acceptance_signals.description: artifact_augment supports prompt + params with RFC 7396 merge-patch
acceptance_signals.evidence: merge=true path live; BUG-056 closed by 69d09851.

acceptance_signals.description: state_at(commit) returns the artifact graph as it was at a SHA
acceptance_signals.evidence: TimeMachine.state_at(commit) and workspace_state_at action expose snapshot+replay; integration tests cover both commit and timestamp cutoffs.

acceptance_signals.description: Freshness enum {fresh, unknown, stale, superseded} derived from topo-distance to HEAD
acceptance_signals.evidence: Enum derives from topo-distance between HEAD and the newest reviewed event's anchor_commit; surfaces in artifact(find) payloads.

progress_log.note: artifact_augment ships merge-patch mode; BUG-056 closed.
TimeMachine state_at + freshness derivation shipped. workspace_state_at exposes snapshots at commit/timestamp. All acceptance signals met. Closing goal.
